channel.title: +Motion on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Motion on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Cloth washing
item.description: Washing machines are more water efficient than hand washing - but consume more electricity (obviously). Front loaders seem to use less water, result in less water retention in clothes, are more energy efficient - RW. But as of 2020, top loaders seem to be catching up.

item.title: Dish washing
item.description: Situation Standard dimensions noted elsewhere. “drain pipe run on the floor level or at a certain height. - The drain water comes out from machine through a pump. As per the specification of the machine this can pump drain water up to approximately 1m height.” Not suitable for use with hard-water (borewell).+++(5)+++ Cost Running cost 2020 INR - Electricity ~ 150 Consumables ~ 200 . Time: 10 minutes per loading. Power “Based on usage pattern of 2 months with most of the the time using quick mode which is only 30 minutes cycle with hot water and machine running once a day (every night).

item.title: Pump
item.description: Submersible pumps 1kW Sharp, 4000Rs, 6 months VKing, 7500, 5 years

item.title: Toothbrush
item.description: History Oral-B Vitality FlossAction - Much before 2015 to present . Charger type 3757, handle type 3709 (very generic, with many replacement manufacturers).
